name: Eldritch Moon

draft.notes: Pack has only 9 commons because it includes a dedicated double-faced card (DFC) slot. Structure: 9 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 1 DFC (common/uncommon), then a basic land OR checklist, then an ad card. A rare/mythic DFC appears 1/8 of the time. Foil displaces a common; cannot get a rare/mythic DFC and a foil in the same pack. Basic land from Shadows over Innistrad. [Refined: added dedicated DFC slot (filter: double_faced) so the pack totals 15.]

statedRates: Rare/mythic double-faced card appears 1/8 of packs. Foil 1:67.
sourceNotes: Small set with 21 double-faced cards (including 3 pairs of meld cards). DFC slot is in addition to standard game cards (commons reduced from 10 to 9). Land slot is a basic land (from SOI) or checklist; lands appear ~1/3 of the time. US printing sequential collation. 36 packs per box.
